order: Runner phases consume resolved procedural guidance but cannot weaken AGENTS.MD invariants or reinterpret an invalid local instruction as absent.

These seven compatibility phases remain the fallback unless the exact repository has passed externally trusted, candidate-bound headless Activation; the paused Control Center is not an execution prerequisite and cannot grant release authority.

A protected runtime change must prove exact same-range parent document synchronization, environment-aware isolation refusal or real containment, the focused Next Workflow aggregate, and ordinary PR/main CI without treating skipped unavailable-environment execution as production evidence.
A bootstrap regression may use a private non-executed provider descriptor on CI without Codex; release proof still requires the actual installed, pinned, certified, and observed native provider.
